# ✅ 30-Minute Quick Checklist - Copy/Paste Products (No Images)

**Goal:** Get homepage working with 30 products, NO images needed!

---

## 🚀 Preparation (2 min)

- [ ] Open Sanity Studio: https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio
- [ ] Log in with your credentials
- [ ] Open guide: `COPY_PASTE_PRODUCTS_NO_IMAGES.md`
- [ ] Keep this checklist open

---

## 📂 Step 1: Create 6 Main Categories (5 min)

Click "Categories" → "+ Create" → Copy/paste each:

- [ ] **Fresh Mushrooms** - "Fresh mushroom varieties" - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Dried Mushrooms** - "Dried and dehydrated mushrooms" - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Specialty Mushrooms** - "Rare and specialty varieties" - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Organic Collection** - "Certified organic mushrooms" - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Products** - "Mushroom products and derivatives" - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Bundles** - "Mushroom variety packs and bundles" - **SKIP IMAGE**

**✅ Result:** 6 main categories created!

---

## 📁 Step 2: Create 6 Subcategories (5 min)

Click "Categories" → "+ Create" → Copy/paste + **SELECT PARENT**:

- [ ] **Fresh Shiitake** → Parent: Fresh Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Fresh Oyster** → Parent: Fresh Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Fresh Button** → Parent: Fresh Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Fresh Enoki** → Parent: Fresh Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Dried Shiitake** → Parent: Dried Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **King Oyster** → Parent: Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**

**✅ Result:** 12 total categories with hierarchy!

---

## ⭐ Step 3: Add 10 Featured Products (15 min)

Click "Products" → "+ Create" → Copy/paste + **CHECK "FEATURED" BOX**:

- [ ] **Fresh Shiitake** (₱450) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Shiitake - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Fresh Oyster** (₱320) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Oyster - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Fresh White Button** (₱180) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Button - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Premium Lion's Mane** (₱680) → Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Fresh Enoki** (₱250) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Enoki - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **King Oyster Premium** (₱420) → Specialty → King Oyster - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Gourmet Bundle** (₱980) → Bundles - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Specialty Mix** (₱650) → Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Organic Shiitake** (₱520) → Organic Collection - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED
- [ ] **Deluxe Gift Basket** (₱1,850) → Bundles - **SKIP IMAGE** - ✅ FEATURED

**✅ Result:** Homepage carousel works!

---

## 📦 Step 4: Add 20 Regular Products (15 min)

Click "Products" → "+ Create" → Copy/paste (NO "Featured" checkbox):

### Fresh Varieties (5 products)
- [ ] **Fresh Button Sliced** (₱200) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Button - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Baby Button** (₱150) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Button - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Pink Oyster** (₱350) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Oyster - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Fresh Shiitake Sliced** (₱480) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Shiitake - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Fresh Enoki Twin Pack** (₱450) → Fresh Mushrooms → Fresh Enoki - **SKIP IMAGE**

### Dried Varieties (4 products)
- [ ] **Dried Shiitake** (₱680) → Dried Mushrooms → Dried Shiitake - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Dried Oyster** (₱450) → Dried Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Dried Shiitake Whole** (₱750) → Dried Mushrooms → Dried Shiitake - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Dried Shiitake Sliced** (₱620) → Dried Mushrooms → Dried Shiitake - **SKIP IMAGE**

### Specialty Varieties (4 products)
- [ ] **Fresh Maitake** (₱720) → Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Reishi Slices** (₱890) → Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Lion's Mane Sliced** (₱650) → Specialty Mushrooms - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **King Oyster Large** (₱480) → Specialty → King Oyster - **SKIP IMAGE**

### Organic Collection (4 products)
- [ ] **Organic Oyster** (₱380) → Organic Collection - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Organic Button** (₱220) → Organic Collection - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Organic Shiitake Powder** (₱350) → Organic Collection - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Organic Mushroom Mix** (₱550) → Organic Collection - **SKIP IMAGE**

### Bundles (3 products)
- [ ] **Starter Bundle** (₱550) → Bundles - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Premium Variety** (₱1,280) → Bundles - **SKIP IMAGE**
- [ ] **Family Pack** (₱780) → Bundles - **SKIP IMAGE**

**✅ Result:** 30 total products!

---

## 🧪 Step 5: Test Your Work (3 min)

- [ ] Open homepage: http://localhost:3000/
- [ ] Scroll to "Our Bestsellers" section
- [ ] **Expected:** 10 products in carousel with arrows
- [ ] Click arrows to navigate carousel
- [ ] Open shop: http://localhost:3000/shop
- [ ] **Expected:** All 30 products visible
- [ ] Test category filter (select "Fresh Mushrooms")
- [ ] Click any product to see detail page

**✅ Result:** Everything works!

---

## 🖼️ Later: Add Images (Optional - When Ready)

When you have product images:

- [ ] Open Sanity Studio
- [ ] Click "Products" → Select product
- [ ] Click "Product Image" field
- [ ] Upload image
- [ ] Click "Publish"
- [ ] Repeat for all 30 products

**Image Sources:**
- Unsplash: https://unsplash.com/s/photos/mushroom
- Pexels: https://www.pexels.com/search/mushroom/
- Your own photos!

---

## 🎉 DONE!

**What You Built:**
- ✅ 12 categories (hierarchical structure)
- ✅ 30 products (complete details)
- ✅ 10 featured (homepage carousel)
- ✅ 13 with promotions (discounts)
- ✅ All with SKU codes, stock, weights
- ⚠️ No images yet (you'll add later)

**Total Time:** 30-40 minutes

**Next Steps:**
- Add images when ready (see guide)
- Add more products (use same template)
- Test checkout flow
- Share with team!
